description: Attach a note to a commit without rewriting it
tags: leave a comment on a commit
intents: add a note to an existing commit without changing it
annotate a commit with extra information
attach a comment to a past commit
leave a side note on a commit
add metadata to a commit without rewriting history
tag a commit with extra context after the fact
record a review note against a specific commit
example: git notes add -m "reviewed by qa" abc123
